3214060.name: Tetherfall Demo
3214060.description:
Step into the beginning of Tetherfall, where a father’s desperate search for his missing daughter leads him into a nightmare beyond comprehension.

In this demo, experience the unsettling first moments of the game—where reality begins to unravel. Explore eerie, liminal spaces filled with shifting environments and creeping dread. Shadows move when you're not looking, whispers echo from unseen sources, and the world itself seems to distort around you.

Unravel cryptic clues, navigate the unknown, and face the creeping realization that something else is watching. The choices you make now may set the course for what’s to come—but are you ready for the truth?

Can you hold onto reality, or will you fall deeper into the nightmare?
3214060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
